description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a cartoonish fox with exaggerated features. The toy is predominantly a vibrant reddish-pink color, with large, rounded ears that have lighter pink inner sections and a tuft of fur on top of its head. Its face features a prominent black eye patch over the right eye, a large snout with a black nose, and two visible buck teeth protruding from its mouth. The eyes are oversized and expressive, with orange irises and raised eyebrows, giving the toy a playful and slightly mischievous look. The limbs are short and rounded, with the toy posed in a seated position and its arms slightly forward. The back is plain, with no visible markings or accessories.
description: A plush, cartoonish fox stuffed toy with a red-pink body, large ears, a black eye patch, and expressive eyes. It is seated with rounded limbs and a playful facial expression.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded snout, large ear, and the protruding nose, with the arm and leg visible in profile.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the black eye patch, expressive eyes, buck teeth, and both large ears, with arms and legs spread out.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the other ear and cheek, with the snout and nose in profile and the arm and leg visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and both ears, with no facial features or accessories visible.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoon fox with an eye patch
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is playful and slightly mischievous, with wide, expressive eyes, raised eyebrows, and a small open mouth showing two buck teeth.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly forward and legs spread out in a relaxed seated position.
